PowerModType.Description: Increases maximum number of Bleed Stacks@Bleed Stacks:, +1, +2, +3, +4, +5
Increases Poison Damage vs. Bleeding targets@Poison vs Bleeding:, +2%, +4%, +8%, +12%, +18%
Increases Armor Bane and Armor Break durations@Duration (seconds):, +.1, +.3, +.6, +1.1, +1.8
Increases effectiveness of Armor Bane and Armor Break@Effect:, +2%, +4%, +6%, +8%, +10%
Increases Heavy Blow Critical Effect@Heavy Blow Damage:, +1%, +2%, +4%, +7%, +10%
Deal extra damage to slowed and immobilized enemies@Bonus Damage:, 1%, 2%, 3%, 5%, 7%
Gain a Defense bonus while in Stealth@Defense Bonus:, 1%, 2%, 3%, 5%, 8%
Gain a Critical Chance bonus while in Stealth@Critical Chance Bonus:, 0.15%, 0.3%, 0.6%, 1.05%, 1.5%
Heal for a percent of your Expertise when entering Stealth@Healing (% Expertise):, 5%, 10%, 20%, 35%, 60%
Gain a Poison Damage bonus against Cursed targets.@Poison Damage Bonus:, 2%, 4%, 6%, 8%, 10%
Gain a Damage Bonus for 3 seconds when you reduce a target to 0 HP. 10 second cooldown.@Damage Bonus:, 1%, 2%, 4%, 6%, 10%
Gain an Attack Speed bonus for 5 seconds when you fall below 20% HP. 15 second cooldown.@Attack Speed Bonus:, 1%, 2%, 4%, 7%, 10%
Damage nearby foes when melee attacked by an Ignited enemy@Cooldown (seconds):, 15, 13, 10, 8, 6
Gain Recovery for 5 seconds when you fall below 20% HP @Recovery Bonus:, 2%, 5%, 9%, 14%, 20%@Cooldown (seconds):, 30, 30, 30, 25, 20
Heal for a percent of your Expertise whenever you use a Combat Ability@ Healing (% Expertise):, 2%, 5%, 11%, 20%, 30%
Reduce the amount of damage you receive from Damage Over Time effects@DoT Reduction:, 1%, 3%, 6%, 10%, 15%
Add a percent of your Expertise to your Attack@Attack (% Expertise):, +.5%, +1%, +2%, +3%, +5%
Add a percent of your Expertise to your Defense@Defense (% Expertise):, +.1%, +.3%, +.6%, +1%, +1.5%
Add a percent of your Expertise to your Max HP@HP (% Expertise):, +3%, +8%, +16%, +28%, +45%
Gain a Critical Chance bonus vs. Staggered and Stunned targets@Critical Chance Bonus:, 0.15%, 0.3%, 0.45%, 0.75%, 1.2%
Reduce the effectiveness of Debuffs that decrease your stats@Debuff Reduction:, 1%, 2%, 4%, 7%, 10%
Gain Bonus Defense while Sentinel Form is not on Cooldown@Defense:, +1%, +2%, +3%, +4%, +5%
Increases Maximum Number of Burn Stacks@Burn Stacks:, +1, +2, +3, +4, +5
Set off an AoE burst when you attack a Burning enemy with Fire damage@Cooldown (seconds):, 15, 14, 13, 12, 10
Increases Maximum number of Scorch Stacks@Scorch Stacks:, +1, +2, +3, +4, +5
Increases maximum number of Chilblains Stacks@Chilblains Stacks:, +1, +2, +3, +4, +5
Increases Ice damage based on your Expertise.@Damage (%Expertise):, 75%, 150%, 250%, 375%, 500%
Increases Freeze Durability based on your Expertise.@Durability (%Expertise):, 100%, 200%, 300%, 400%, 500%
Gain Bonus Damage to the next Combat Ability cast within 3 seconds of a Master Ability@Bonus Damage:, 1%, 2%, 4%, 7%, 10%
Casting a Combat Ability pauses Master Mana drain briefly@Drain Pause (seconds):, .1, .25, .45, .7, 1
Reduces the target's healing effects.@Healing Reduction:, 10%, 20%, 30%, 40%, 50%
Deal extra damage to Bound Targets@Bonus Damage:, 1%, 2%, 3%, 5%, 7%
Increases Poison Damage vs. Bound targets@Poison vs Bound:, +2%, +6%, +13%, +23%, +35%

Gain Bonus Defense vs Cursed Enemies@Defense:, +1%, +2%, +4%, +6%, +10%
Gain healing from Undead Minion Damage@Transferred:, 1%, 2%, 3%, 4%, 5%

Gain Bonus Damage vs Cursed Enemies@Defense:, +1%, +2%, +3%, +4%, +5%
Increased Expertise for 5 sec whenever you summon an Undead Minion@Expertise Bonus:, 1%, 2%, 3%, 4%, 5%
Heal targets gain Defense Bonus for 1 sec@Defense Bonus:, .5%, 1%, 2%, 3%, 6%
Increased Healing on targets with less than 20% Health@Healing Boost:, 1%, 2%, 3%, 4%, 5%
Shield Stun adds a stack of Ignite
Adds 2 Stacks of Burn to Fire Blast
Gain +50% Defense for 1 second during Ice Lance
Mist Walk adds 3 stacks of Bleed
Bonus damage per stack of Ignite
Bolster ghoul ranged attacks inflict Poison
